bug.description: F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption

prompt:
There is a F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption downstream of function fill_msg3_crnti_pdu in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_UE/nr_ra_procedures.c:1044.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
